summary: Tested user-specific theming for Digital Card public pages. All features working correctly: Brand Kit settings page loads with theme toggle (Light/Dark), GET and PUT API endpoints include page_theme field, card data API returns brand_kit object, and Digital Card page renders correctly with both dark and light themes and custom accent colors.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: BrandKitUpdate Pydantic model correctly includes page_theme field (line 70 in email.py)
Backend: digital_card.py correctly returns brand_kit object with page_theme, primary_color, etc. (lines 166-173)
Frontend: brand-kit.tsx has working theme toggle UI with Dark/Light options and visual previews
Frontend: [userId].tsx correctly builds theme using buildTheme() function and applies dynamic styles
Code organization is clean - theming logic separated in buildTheme() and getDynamicStyles() functions

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements and theming working correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Brand Kit page_theme feature is fully tested and working. The test file test_brand_kit_page_theme.py includes 10 tests covering GET/PUT brand-kit endpoints and card data API. Digital Card at /card/{userId} correctly renders with dark/light themes based on brand_kit.page_theme. Primary color is applied to photo border, title text, divider, and CTA buttons.

backend_api.PUT /api/email/brand-kit/user/{userId}: PASS - Accepts and persists page_theme='dark' and 'light'
backend_api.GET /api/card/data/{userId}: PASS - Returns brand_kit object with page_theme, primary_color, secondary_color, accent_color, logo_url, company_name

frontend_brand_kit_page.header: PASS - Shows 'Brand Kit' title with Save button
frontend_brand_kit_page.public_page_theme_section: PASS - Shows 'Public Page Theme' label with description
frontend_brand_kit_page.dark_light_toggle: PASS - Both Dark and Light options visible with visual previews
frontend_brand_kit_page.color_pickers: PASS - Primary, Secondary, Accent color pickers working

frontend_digital_card_page.dark_theme: PASS - Page renders with dark background (#0D0D0D), white text, accent-colored elements
frontend_digital_card_page.light_theme: PASS - Page renders with light background (#F8F7F4), dark text, accent-colored elements
frontend_digital_card_page.accent_color_application: PASS - Primary color applied to: photo border, title text, divider, CTA buttons, section titles
